title: Parameterized Counter
prompt: Create an always_ff based up-counter with parameter WIDTH and synchronous clear.
constraints: Use logic type and parameterized width.
expected_output: Count increments on each clock and clears when clr is high.

title: Priority Encoder
prompt: Implement a 4-to-2 priority encoder with valid signal using always_comb.
expected_output: enc outputs highest asserted input index and valid indicates any active input.

title: Mailbox Producer-Consumer TB
prompt: Create basic testbench classes to send integer transactions through mailbox.
constraints: Use one producer and one consumer class.
expected_output: Consumer prints values generated by producer.

title: Constrained Random Packet
prompt: Define packet class with constrained length and payload values.
constraints: len in [1:8], payload size equals len.

title: Minimal UVM Sequence
prompt: Write a UVM sequence that sends 10 transactions.

title: Simple Scoreboard Compare
prompt: Build a scoreboard method that compares expected and observed queue elements.
expected_output: Scoreboard reports pass/fail with mismatch detail.

title: Handshake Assertion
prompt: Write assertion: once req rises, gnt must come within 3 cycles.
expected_output: Assertion fails if grant latency exceeds 3 cycles.
solution_code:
property req_to_gnt; @(posedge clk) disable iff(!rst_n) req |-> ##[1:3] gnt; endproperty
assert property(req_to_gnt);

title: No X on Output Assertion
prompt: Ensure output bus y has no unknown value after reset deassertion.
expected_output: Assertion flags any X/Z on y during active operation.
solution_code:
property no_x_y; @(posedge clk) disable iff(!rst_n) !$isunknown(y); endproperty
assert property(no_x_y);

title: APB Write Task
prompt: Create an APB master task for single write transfer.
expected_output: PSEL asserted in setup, PENABLE in next cycle, then deassert.

title: AXI Ready/Valid Monitor
prompt: Write monitor logic to count successful AXI write address handshakes.
expected_output: Counter tracks accepted AW channel beats.

title: CDC Synchronizer RTL
prompt: Implement a 2-flop synchronizer module for single-bit control signal.
expected_output: s_out is metastability-hardened version of s_in.
solution_code:
module sync2(input wire clk_d, input wire rst_n, input wire s_in, output reg s_out);
  reg ff1;
  always @(posedge clk_d or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin ff1 <= 1'b0; s_out <= 1'b0; end
    else begin ff1 <= s_in; s_out <= ff1; end
  end
endmodule

title: Rate Limiter FSM
prompt: Design FSM that allows one request grant every N cycles.
expected_output: Grant pulses only when cooldown expires and request is high.

title: Pipeline Valid Propagation
prompt: Implement 3-stage valid pipeline for datapath synchronization.
expected_output: valid_out asserts three cycles after valid_in.
solution_code:
module vpipe3(input wire clk, input wire rst_n, input wire valid_in, output reg valid_out);
  reg v1, v2;
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin v1<=0; v2<=0; valid_out<=0; end
    else begin v1<=valid_in; v2<=v1; valid_out<=v2; end
  end
endmodule
